deploy.startCommand: echo '[boot] env DATABASE_URL='${DATABASE_URL:0:30}'... PORT='${PORT:-3000}' NODE_ENV='${NODE_ENV} && echo '[boot] testing pg connectivity' && bun -e 'const s = (await import("postgres")).default(process.env.DATABASE_URL, {max:1}); const r = await s\`select 1 as ok\`; console.error("[boot] pg ok:", r); await s.end();' && echo '[boot] migrating' && bun run migrate && echo '[boot] starting next' && bun run start
